message.content:
@startuml
skinparam UMLClassDiagram font "Comic Sans MS"

class Dummy {
    label "Dummy"
    label "C"
    label "C"
}

class Foo {
    label "Foo"
    label "C"
    label "C"
}

class Foo2 {
    label "Foo2"
    label "C"
    label "C"
}

note right of Dummy
    label "A link"
    label "note that is red"
    label "Another link"
    label "this is my note on right link and in blue"
end note

Dummy --> Foo
Dummy --> Foo2

note right of Dummy
    label "A link"
    label "note that is red"
    label "Another link"
    label "this is my note on right link and in blue"
end note

@enduml
